# Stripped from this pack

The upstream driver vendored ~280MB of prebuilt `mavsdk_server_*` binaries
(linux/macos/win × arch). They are intentionally NOT committed here.

Get them from the MAVSDK releases (https://github.com/mavlink/MAVSDK/releases)
or the upstream `sensors/robotics/sensorhub-driver-mavsdk/dist/` directory.
They are runtime artifacts, not part of the source comparison.
